title: JAM 2025 Admit Card

detail.short_info: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), Delhi has Download JAM Admit Card 2025. Candidates with Any Degree can Apply Online.

content.text: Name of the Post: JAM 2025 Admit Card

Brief Information: Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), Delhi has Advertised a notification for Conducting the Joint Admission test for Masters (JAM 2025). Those Candidates who are interested in the exam details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the Notification & Apply Online.

items.label: Application Fee
items.text: For Female/SC/ST/PwD (One Paper): Rs. 900/- For Female/SC/ST/PwD (Two Papers): Rs. 1250/- For All Others (One paper): Rs. 1800/- For All Other (Two Papers): Rs. 2500/- Fee Amount – Fees for changing Category/ Gender/ Test paper/ Examination city is Rs. 300 apart from the applicable difference in Application fee. Payment Mode: Through Net banking/ Debit card/ Credit card/ UPI

items.label: Important Dates
items.text: JAM Online Application Processing System (JOAPS) Website Opens: 03-09-2024 (Tuesday) Last Date for Online Registration/Application Submission: 11-10-2024 (11:59 PM) Availability of JAM 2025 Admit Cards for download: 06-01-2025 Date of JAM 2025 Exam: 02-02-2025 (Sunday) Date for Announcement of the Results: 19-03-2025 (Sunday)

seo_tags: JAM Admit Card 2025 – Admit Card Download
